title: NYU Shanghai Summer Academy
description: Jointly established by New York University and East China Normal University, NYU Shanghai is the third degree-granting campus in NYU’s global network, joining NYU Abu Dhabi and NYU's campus in New York City.
text:
NYU Shanghai Summer Academy
点击这里前往中文页面
NYU Shanghai is proud to announce the launch of our Summer Academy.
Whether you are a pre-college student preparing for your future academic journey, an undergraduate seeking deeper expertise, a professional looking to enhance your career, or a lifelong learner eager to explore new disciplines, NYU Shanghai’s Summer Academy provides a range of intellectually enriching and globally connected opportunities targeted at just the right level for you.
Immerse yourself in a world-class learning experience in one of the world’s most dynamic cities. At China’s first Sino-US research university and the third degree-granting campus of the NYU Global Network, participants will engage with renowned faculty on cutting edge topics and experience a vibrant, and truly multicultural academic community.
Participants at every level will:
Advance Your Skills & Knowledge – Sharpen critical thinking, communication, and problem-solving abilities through dynamic, interactive coursework designed to enhance both academic and professional growth.
Engage with World-Class Faculty – Learn from internationally renowned scholars and thought leaders, gaining deep insights into groundbreaking research and interdisciplinary innovation.
Join a Global Learning Community – Connect with a diverse network of peers and faculty from around the world, exchanging ideas and perspectives in a truly international environment.
Expand Your Horizons – Tap into NYU’s extensive global academic resources to explore new fields, advance your career, and cultivate a lifelong passion for learning.
This summer, let the world be your major. Join us at NYU Shanghai and open up endless possibilities!
2026 Programs for:
Pre-College Students
Artificial Intelligence
Emerging Technologies
Undergraduate Students
Chinese Language Immersion
Summer Term Study Away
Adult Learners
Open Courses
2025 Summer Academy Highlights
Resources & Campus Highlights
About NYU Shanghai
Our Campus
Mini-Courses
